title: Multicore - Multiplayer Hardcore
description: Adds hardcore to multiplayer in a way where your friends aren't dead forever.
body:
# Multicore - Optimized Multiplayer Hardcore

Welcome to Multicore. The plugin made to optimize the multiplayer Minecraft Hardcore experience.

## Features
### Added
- Allows you to play hardcore on multiplayer with friends in a more customisable manner when compared to vanilla.
- Choose whether you want your dead friends to be banned or set as a spectator.
- Give yourselves lives that give you an extra chance.
- Revive players if something goes wrong. *(/adminrevive)*
- Vanilla revival. *(revive dead players without the need for operator permissions at a cost)*

### Planned
- Temporary death punishments. *(e.g. only for an hour)*
- PlaceholderAPI compatability.
## Commands
### Everyone
- **/multicore help** - *Displays a list of commands included in the Multicore plugin.*
- **/multicore lives** (/lives) - *Tells you how many lives you have left.*
### Operators
- **/multicore reload** - *Reloads the plugin configuration.*
- **/multicore resetplayerdata {player}** - *Resets a player's Multicore player data*
- **/adminrevive {player}** - *Revives the mentioned player.*

## Guide

The plugin is currently incredibly easy to use and configure. All you need to do is modify the config.yml file located inside the "Multicore" directory in your "plugins" folder.

## Note

As of now, this is the first release. It has many features yet to come with this just containing the bare essentials. Stay tuned for more!

## Reporting Issues

If you come across any issues whilst using the plugin, please use the [issue tracker](https://github.com/ItsMitlit/Multicore-public/issues) to report them so that we can fix them.
